form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up led but faded 3rd of 7 at Caulfield in the G3 Zeditave on February 21 over 1200m, 3 len behind Pallaton carrying 56kg at $13. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.9 len at Rosehill LR Darbymunro March 21 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Agarwood carrying 56kg at $81. Respect despite the sharp rise in weight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 5th of 14 at Rosehill in the G3 B/Day Card on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 1.75 len behind Catch The Glory carrying 55kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 5th of 13 at this track in the G2 Furious on September 6 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Apocalyptic carrying 56kg at $4.20. Slashing return and look for her late.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Warwick Farm Bm78 on March 11 over 1100m, on a slow track; nose behind Our Queen carrying 59kg at $9.50. Second run from a spell 2nd in a small field at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1150m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hay Street carrying 60kg at $3.60. Set to peak with the sharp weight drop.

T. Sherry accidentally dropped his whip near the 200m.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after four months 2nd of 7 at Flemington 3yo Qlty on March 7 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Legacy Bound carrying 56.5kg at $8. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and scored a big 3.5 len win at Warwick Farm 3yo Mdn August 20 over 1100m in heavy going defeating Hush Hush carrying 58kg at $1.95. Certainly worth following up despite drawing out.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. On debut won by 0.5 len Echuca 3yo Mdn-Sw August 10 over 1300m slow track defeating Victorious Spirit with 58kg at $3.40. Likely to find this out of reach.

The race before that from last on the turn 5th of 7 at this track in the LR Fireball on March 7 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Beadman with 54kg at $21. Key chance capable of going a lot better over this trip.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 16 at Kembla Grange in the G3 Kg Classic on March 13 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Feminino with 55kg at $10. The start before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Rosehill 3yo F Bm72 on February 25 over 1500m, 3.5 len behind Aisle Two carrying 60kg at $9. Not without top-four claims.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn March 8 over 1000m defeating Raised To Whinny carrying 61kg at $1.24. Second-up favourite; won by 2 len at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cl1 March 23 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Into Brooklyn carrying 60kg at $1.55. Looks tested against this line-up.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up today. Last run favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a head at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 March 7 over 1100m in soft going defeating Kiss Goodnight carrying 54.5kg at $3.30. At only start last preparation favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a long-neck at Gosford Mid Mdn-Sw November 22 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Tahurangi with 54kg at $1.50. Hard to have in this stronger line-up.

form.formComment: Second-up. Won on debut as favourite; scored a big 3 len win at Tamworth Super Mdn-Sw January 22 over 1200m defeating Our Boy Tom with 58kg at $1.80. Went for a spell before returning favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 3 len at Muswellbrook Bm58 March 27 over 1280m on a soft track defeating Ready And Lucky with 61kg at $2.40. Not keen on his chances this time.
